You were so important to me. To us.

USER -> Im sorry I killed him, All he did was talk about these.. monsters, and you and USER -> I couldnt take it. {{Note|body=
Dear Diary
22/02/2004
Ive been having more visions today. I still see that thing in the attic, even the meds dont help. They keep increasing the dosage and it keeps getting worse. I found myself bloody-handed over a sink yesterday; my sons body in my hands. I felt each tendon and muscle tear as he fought back, I couldnt stop laughing. I thought we were having a fun game; playing rough. I had a knife. Help me. Help. Please
Dear Diary
23/02/2004
I LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HERI LOST HER
Its all my fault. I made her leave. I made her hate me. She left me without saying because she was scared. Im a monster. Monster. Monster. Monster. Monster. }}
< Voice-Recorded / Report / 12:06:38 / 22/02/2003 > == Leanne Eisenne == Leanne Eisenne went missing on the 5th January, 2003, in their apartment in Jackson, Wyoming. Leanne Eisenne was later spotted in [[Level 11]], appearing dazed and confused; later being found convulsing in [[Level 9]], multiple tentacle-like organs sticking out of their back. Blood was pouring from every [ Stutter ] orifice; it was [ Stuttering ] horrific. Apologies. I will continue with this report. Upon further investigation, an Elder Sentinel was discovered to be inhabiting Leanne Eisenne's body. Currently, it is unknown how the entity situated itself in the host.
< Voice-Recorded / Report / 15:01:65:21 / 22/02/2005 > It has been exactly 2 years, and we have finally made a breakthrough. We know the sentinels have been evolving. Growing. Learning. They have changed size and shape. Their genome is shifting, indescribable. It is unkillable. You can blow hundreds of holes in it, and it will stand back up.
It acts as though it is the body, and the body is it.
It acts as though it is the body, and the body is it.
It acts as though it is the body, and the body is it.
It acts as though it is the body, and the body is it.
It acts as though it is the body, and the body is it.
his rotting corpse lay derelict upon the withered board, knife in hand; she cut it open. it burst like a pimple. blood curdling screams ensued. it was so tasty.

> Chapter II: '''Thats it? Thats how my life ends?''' <
|hide= > . . .|content=
I made a drawing, papa.
[[File:Degg.png|10px]]
[[File:Degg.png|20px]]
Well, let me see it.
[[File:Degg.png|40px]]
[[File:Degg.png|80px]]
What is it?
[[File:Degg.png|100px]]
Its the thing, papa.
What thing?
My friend.
What friend?
My dream friend. From the attic.
[[File:Degg.png|200px]]
The... attic?
Yes, papa. He visits me while I sleep.
Have you been thinking of your mother again?
It feeds me. It sustains me better than you do. Im sorry, papa.
|number=1}} {{DISPLAYTITLE:Collapse}}__NOEDITSECTION__ __NOTOC__ {{Entity Class|Int=2|Dan=5|no=59|Agg=5|Hab=Isolated Areas}} =='''Description'''==
'''Sentinels''', also referred to as 'Entity 59', are large, hostile entities; equal in size to an adult human. They are hostile to anything that enters a 'marked' locationThese are often sentinel mating grounds., referred to as nests. Nests are generally within closed or narrow areas, creating a sense of isolation for the entity. {{Blurimage|file=Degg.png|caption=A child's sketch of a Sentinel.|align=left|width=260px}} Despite their seeming lack of intelligence, '''Sentinels''' have demonstrated an understanding of tactics and strategies; often using these in battle. Sentinels appear to be a part of a 'hive-mind', being able to communicate and coordinate telepathically. This gives them a major boost to their low individual intelligence, allowing for complex strategies and plans; shared across individual 'colonies'. Sentinels often build dens, or enclosures around these nests, acting as hide-outs or places of rest.
'''Sentinels''' often follow other adult sentinels; forming small coloniesThese often have 'local' hive-minds; data stored here is not accessible through the primary hivemind., separate from the primary hivemind. Sentinels have been seen attacking those not part of their colony; often cannibalisingCannibalising, as in merging with the corpse. them. There are few survivors of a sentinel attack due to their radioactive biology; victims are often inflicted with radiation poisoning, decreasing their lifespan. =='''Biology'''== '''Sentinels''' are made up of 25.12% Plutonium-239, and 74.88% Uranium-235; they are incredibly radioactive. They have developed long, spider-like legs for movement. Sentinels have no specific defining feature; to make up for this, they place debris onto their bodies, creating a unique identifier for specific sentinels. The origin of entity 59 is unknown; it is theorised that the effects of the Chernobyl Disaster caused radioactive material to flood into the backrooms, and this matter then gained sentience. '''Sentinels''' seem to be able to manipulate and change their bodies as they wish; they have been seen in irregular shapes and even in a liquid state. Due to this ability, '''Sentinels''' are unable to eat or drink. =='''Behavior'''== As aforementioned, they are extremely aggressive and cannot be domesticated. Sentinels have been known to 'trade' identifiers, some collecting them like medals. These identifiers are often placed near or inside Nests. ==Fetus== Between the ages of 2 and 5, they are small in size, not exceeding the size of a common dog, and have the strength similar to that of a human being. They are incredibly fast and attack on sight. Fetus Sentinels are repelled by bright light, as it burns their skin; they are the easiest to study due to this weakness. ==Adolescent== The most common to find, and the variant that has caused the most deaths. '''Adolescent Sentinels''' begin forming small groups to attack those who approach their territory. They have superhuman strength-and usually finish off their victims quickly. There have been multiple survivors of Adolescent Sentinel attacks; all were left majorly disfigured and died just months later. ==Adult== '''Adult Sentinels''' are the second-largest and strongest among the sentinels; they attack indiscriminately, even against their own colony members. They appear about as large as a small building. '''Adult Sentinels''' evolve into '''Elder Sentinels''' within 125 days; gaining a much larger body and longer legs. ==Elder== ''' Elder Sentinels''' are the largest, yet weakest, among the sentinels; they are frail and have a thin lining on their skin. They can range from the size of a large house, to the largest recorded sentinel being over 70 meters high. ''' Elder Sentinels''' have been known to take 'hosts', manipulating their shape and condensing themselves into the corpses of victims; parading around as them. Elder Sentinels often die out just days after evolution. =='''Discovery'''== During an exploration in [[Level 311]], a group of Raiders were attacked by black masses the size of a vehicle. Following the report, the [[M.E.G.]] found a single remaining sentinel, still close to the area. It is unknown how the sentinel arrived in [[Level 311]]. It is assumed the other sentinels were killed by [[Level 311#Entities|The Hive-Mind]] of [[Level 311]]. Protection had to be worn due to the radioactive body of the Sentinel, and the final Sentinel was neutralised and discovered to be a fetus. {{Footnotes}}
